# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the user-visible or contributor-visible outcome and the boundary of
the change.

## Verification

List the exact commands and manual checks run, plus anything not verified.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is provided under the repository's MIT License.
- [ ] Replaced paths were deleted; no compatibility shim or legacy fallback was added.
- [ ] No dataset, credential, private URL/path, unpublished result, or identifying screenshot is included.
- [ ] New fixtures or retained assets have explicit provenance and redistribution review.
- [ ] Workflow, gate, or fixture-registry changes are called out for maintainer review.
